## Meeting Purpose

[Review fwd.digital's content strategy research and align on next steps for Manifold's content creation](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=15.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on trusted research environment (TRE) as primary topic cluster, with AI-enabled features as secondary](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Low search volume keywords are expected and acceptable given the niche industry](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Manifold to provide feedback on proposed topic clusters, referencing their new TRE white paper](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
  - [Initial content creation to start next week, with an iterative feedback process to refine approach](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

## Topics

### Content Research Approach

  - [Atypical research due to lack of traditional blog content from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Manual keyword research focusing on Manifold's domain and competitive landscape](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Emphasis on trusted research environment (TRE) as a key topic](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Challenges with low search volume keywords, but potential for future growth](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)

### Proposed Topic Clusters

  - [Seven topics developed around trusted research environment](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - [Data management cluster identified, but may be too broad](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [AI-enabled features in TRE as a potential differentiator](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Need to explore pain points and jobs-to-be-done of target personas](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)

### Content Creation Strategy

  - [Initial plan to create 5-7 pieces across 2-3 clusters, likely to be scaled back](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Two calibration articles to start, potentially from different clusters](https://fathom.video/share/6Wu5LUzzVT9uQQMPRx8g414inX12kV_M?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)
